1.content: So who's it going to be?
1.title: Pick the narrator for the story

11.content:
So there I am laying in my crib when all of a sudden my older siblings Bart and Lisa look inside my crib and wonder how I see my family. So Bart starts playing with my toes, and it was fine for awhile but then I got tired of it. So I watched as Lisa tried to tell Bart to leave my toes a lone, but it was no use. So I had to get Bart to stop playing with my toes by myself. What did I do to stop him and in what order was it?

(a) I kicked him in the face, then I threw my urine soaked diaper on his face and it landed urine side up on his face, then I peed on him.
(b) I threw my urine soaked diaper on his face and it landed urine side up on his face, then I peed on him, then I kicked him in the face.
(c) I peed on him, then I threw my urine soaked diaper on his face and it landed urine side up on his face, then I kicked him in the face.

So what option do you want my to go with?
11.title: Maggie

info.brief_description: Base loosely off of Maggie's brain
info.description: You can pick which sibling tells the story of how Maggie got Bart to leave her toes a lone.
